archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with Tactical Minimalism

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode A: Tetris Grid (Asymmetrical Bento) for Features
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm maximum (sharp tactical edges)

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-zinc-700 hover:border-cyan-500 text-white bg-transparent rounded-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-colors p-8 relative overflow-hidden

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical Look): exposed skeleton grids for the features section.
visual_enhancers.effects: Subtle cyan drop-shadows on key CTAs, grain texture overlay.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for tech-forward, crisp iconography.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue lines and dots on black background to represent WireGuard and secure network. Needs heavy opacity overlay (bg-black/80) to ensure text contrast.
Rows of metal bars illuminated with blue light. Represents Fast VPN Servers.
Security and privacy dashboard status. Use as an accent image in the About or How it Works section.

media.logo_instructions: Generate a clean text-based EV / shield mark in cyan (#00E5FF) using HTML/SVG icons (e.g., Phosphor Shield Check). Do not use raster images.

sections: Header (Sticky, glassmorphism backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80, EV Logo, Links)
Hero (Headline: 'Private, Secure VPN Protection', Sub: 'Powered by WireGuard', CTAs: Google Play & Privacy Policy, Background image with heavy overlay)
Features (Bento grid: One-Tap Protection, WireGuard Tech, Fast Servers, No Ads, Secure Public Wi-Fi, Privacy Focused)
How It Works (4 steps vertical or horizontal grid)

PrivacyPolicy.layout: Prose-heavy, narrow container (max-w-3xl) centered. High legibility, left-aligned, muted text.

AccountDeletion.layout: Simple card interface for instructions on how to request account deletion.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Vite with React and Tailwind CSS.
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' in index.html.
Implement Shadcn Accordion for the FAQ section.
Ensure the Hero image uses a gradient overlay or bg-black/80 to maintain WCAG contrast for the text.
Use the cyan accent (#00E5FF) sparingly for primary buttons, active states, and 1px highlights.
Use a Bento grid for the features section, ensuring items aren't perfectly symmetrical (Mode A: Tetris Grid).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and accordion triggers.
Build the EV shield logo purely out of an SVG icon (e.g. ShieldCheck) + text.
